title: Automating Data Type Conversion in SQL
scenario: Generate a SQL script to convert a table's column data types from VARCHAR to INTEGER. Assume the table name is ' employees' and the column name is 'age'. The script should handle NULL values and update the column data type accordingly.
constraints: Must use the ALTER TABLE statement to modify the table
Must use the CHANGE statement to modify the column data type
Must handle NULL values during the conversion process

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated SQL syntax is valid and follows the standard SQL syntax rules.
Verify if the generated SQL script correctly converts the column data type from VARCHAR to INTEGER.
Evaluate how accurately the generated SQL script handles NULL values during the conversion process.
